zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stanley於大約1429年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉堂姆時，她的父親Thomas Stanley25歲，母親Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley29歲。她和Sir Richard Molyneux至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1459年9月23日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stanley于大约1429年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉堂姆时，她的父亲Thomas Stanley25岁，母亲Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley29岁。她和Sir Richard Molyneux至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1459年9月23日在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stanley was born about 1429, in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Stanley, was 25 and her mother, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, was 29. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Richard Molyneux. She died on 23 September 1459, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stanley est née environ 1429, à Lathom, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Stanley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Richard Molyneux. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1459, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stanley um 1429 in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Stanley 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley 29. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Molyneux mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stanley è nata il circa 1429 nel Lathom, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Stanley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Richard Molyneux. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stanleyが約1429年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラソムで生まれた時，父Thomas Stanleyは25歳，母Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyは29歳であった。彼女はSir Richard Molyneuxとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1459年9月23日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stanley(이)가 대략 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 래톰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Stanley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Molyneux(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 9월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1429, em Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Stanley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Richard Molyneux. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stanley родилась около 1429 г. в местности латом, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Stanley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Richard Molyneux. Она умерла 23 сентября 1459 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stanley nació aproximadamente 1429, en Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Stanley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Richard Molyneux. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
